hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】中国自动驾驶卡车领导者表示人工智能突破不会加速推广——原因如下；【WORLD】特朗普重申，他对伊朗“寻求批准战争的最后期限迫在眉睫”感到“不满意”；【WORLD】据说以色列通过铁穹在伊朗战争中帮助保卫阿联酋。

items.title: China’s self-driving truck leaders say AI breakthroughs won’t accelerate rollout — here’s why
items.summary: Rapid advances in AI for coding and chatbots doesn't change the timeline for getting self-driving vehicles on the road, industry executives in China said.
items.title_zh: 中国自动驾驶卡车领导者表示人工智能突破不会加速推广——原因如下
items.summary_zh: 中国行业高管表示，人工智能编码和聊天机器人的快速进步并没有改变自动驾驶汽车上路的时间表。

items.title: Trump repeats that he is 'not happy' with Iran as deadline to seek approval for war looms
items.summary: President Trump said on Friday that said a deal has been hard to reach in part because Iranian leadership was "very confused".
items.title_zh: 特朗普重申，他对伊朗“寻求批准战争的最后期限迫在眉睫”感到“不满意”
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统周五表示，很难达成协议，部分原因是伊朗领导层“非常困惑”。

items.title: Israel Said to Have Helped Defend Emirates in Iran War With Iron Dome
items.summary: It appeared to be the first time the missile defense system was sent to an Arab country. The Emirates bore the brunt of Iran’s retaliatory attacks on Gulf countries during the war.
items.title_zh: 据说以色列通过铁穹在伊朗战争中帮助保卫阿联酋
items.summary_zh: 这似乎是首次向阿拉伯国家发送导弹防御系统。阿联酋在战争期间首当其冲地受到伊朗对海湾国家的报复性袭击。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 在 FedRAMP 中可用
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 可通过 FedRAMP 对 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 OpenAI API 进行中等授权，从而为美国联邦机构提供安全的 AI 采用。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation finalizes sale of 10,000 ether to BitMine as part of its treasury strategy
items.summary: The latest transaction follows a similar March deal in which the foundation sold 5,000 ETH to BitMine, raising roughly $10.2 million.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会最终完成向 BitMine 出售 10,000 个以太币，作为其财务战略的一部分
items.summary_zh: 最新的交易是在 3 月份的一次类似交易之后进行的，当时该基金会向 BitMine 出售了 5,000 ETH，筹集了大约 1,020 万美元。

items.title: Canadian pension giant AIMCo buys the dip in Strategy, now sitting on $69 million unrealized gain
items.summary: AIMCo returns to Michael Saylor's bitcoin treasury company years after exiting, now sitting on a sizable unrealized gain.
items.title_zh: 加拿大养老金巨头 AIMCo 买入 Strategy 的跌幅，目前未实现收益达 6,900 万美元
items.summary_zh: AIMCo 在退出多年后重返 Michael Saylor 的比特币财务公司，目前拥有可观的未实现收益。

items.title: Bitcoin bounces as big tech earnings fuel optimism; short-term pressures remain
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 1, 2026
items.title_zh: 随着大型科技公司的盈利激发乐观情绪，比特币反弹；短期压力依然存在
items.summary_zh: 您对 2026 年 5 月 1 日的展望

items.title: SBI Holdings eyes stake in crypto exchange Bitbank to build digital asset powerhouse
items.summary: The Tokyo-based broker is betting big on crypto with plans in Singapore and a Visa partnership for bank cards that allows users to accumulate digital assets.
items.title_zh: SBI Holdings 有意入股加密货币交易所 Bitbank，打造数字资产巨​​头
items.summary_zh: 这家总部位于东京的经纪商正在大力押注加密货币，计划在新加坡开展业务，并与 Visa 建立银行卡合作伙伴关系，允许用户积累数字资产。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: U.S. oil prices will exceed Iran wartime high to above $125 as conflict drags on, Kalshi traders say
items.summary: The April 7 high of $113 in Western Texas Intermediate crude futures will likely be broken, traders on the prediction markets platform think.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员表示，随着冲突持续下去，美国油价将超过伊朗战时高点，达到 125 美元以上
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员认为，西德克萨斯中质原油期货 4 月 7 日高点 113 美元可能会被打破。

items.title: China’s EV price war turns into AI arms race beyond cheaper cars
items.summary: Chinese EV firms are rapidly rolling out in-car AI features to gain an edge, but as the price war drags on, those technologies are quickly becoming commoditized.
items.title_zh: 中国的电动汽车价格战变成了超越廉价汽车的人工智能军备竞赛
items.summary_zh: 中国电动汽车公司正在迅速推出车载人工智能功能以获得优势，但随着价格战的持续，这些技术正在迅速商品化。

items.title: Apple execs to talk China and tariffs, but will avoid discussing foldable iPhone, per traders on Kalshi
items.summary: Apple is set to report earnings after the bell on Thursday, with its conference call scheduled for 5:00 pm ET.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 交易员表示，苹果高管将讨论中国和关税问题，但将避免讨论可折叠 iPhone
items.summary_zh: 苹果定于周四盘后公布财报，电话会议定于美国东部时间下午 5:00 举行。

items.title: Blue Owl shares surge after private credit firm cites 10X gains from SpaceX
items.summary: Blue Owl said it's made 10 times its investment in SpaceX, which is headed for a record IPO later this year.
items.title_zh: 私人信贷公司称 SpaceX 收益 10 倍后 Blue Owl 股价飙升
items.summary_zh: Blue Owl 表示，其对 SpaceX 的投资是其 10 倍，该公司将于今年晚些时候进行创纪录的 IPO。

items.title: Jerome Powell says he will continue to serve as a Fed governor, calls Trump criticism 'unprecedented'
items.summary: Powell addressed the question of whether he will stay on as a Board of Governors member after his term as chair ends.
items.title_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔表示，他将继续担任美联储理事，称特朗普的批评“史无前例”
items.summary_zh: 鲍威尔谈到了在主席任期结束后是否继续担任理事会成员的问题。

items.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.
items.title_zh: 化肥老板表示，伊朗战争导致数十亿粮食面临风险
items.summary_zh: 雅拉公司的老板表示，伊朗冲突造成的化肥短缺可能会降低农作物产量并推高价格。

items.title: War criminal Mladic close to death, say lawyers asking judge for jail release
items.summary: Mladic, 84, was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes and crimes against humanity during the Bosnian war in 1992-95.
items.title_zh: 律师称战犯姆拉迪奇濒临死亡，要求法官释放监狱
items.summary_zh: 84 岁的姆拉迪奇因 1992-95 年波斯尼亚战争期间的种族灭绝罪、战争罪和反人类罪被判终身监禁。

items.title: Missing Oscar found after Academy Award winner blocked from taking it on flight
items.summary: The airline said the Academy Award was safely in its care in Frankfurt and was arranging its return.
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡金像奖获得者被禁止携带奥斯卡后，失踪的奥斯卡被找到
items.summary_zh: 该航空公司表示，奥斯卡金像奖已安全地存放在法兰克福，并正在安排返还事宜。

items.title: As Israel Entrenches, Frustration With Hezbollah Turns to Support
items.summary: With the cease-fire fraying and Israel demolishing villages in the south, many Hezbollah supporters in Lebanon are putting aside their annoyance with the group and turning to it for protection.
items.title_zh: 随着以色列的巩固，对真主党的不满转为支持
items.summary_zh: 随着停火协议的破裂和以色列摧毁南部村庄，黎巴嫩的许多真主党支持者正在抛开对该组织的不满，转而寻求该组织的保护。

items.title: Trump ‘Not Satisfied’ With Iran’s Proposal on Ending War

items.summary_zh: 最新计划的细节尚不清楚，特朗普总统也没有明确表示反对。

items.title: In Packed Cafes, Iranians Yearn to Escape War’s Wreckage
items.summary: Cafes and coffee shops give Iranians affordable places to talk about their hopes, fears and the cost of living as well as to seek company in uncertain times.
items.title_zh: 在拥挤的咖啡馆里，伊朗人渴望逃离战争的废墟
items.summary_zh: 咖啡馆和咖啡馆为伊朗人提供了经济实惠的场所，让他们可以谈论自己的希望、恐惧和生活成本，并在不确定的时期寻求陪伴。

items.summary_zh: 比特币（BTC）较周四上涨 1.9%，也是表现最好的。

items.title: Paradigm researcher proposes timestamp ‘escape hatch’ to protect Satoshi-era bitcoin from quantum threats
items.summary: PACTs would let long-term bitcoin holders prepare for a worst-case quantum scenario without moving funds or signaling activity onchain.

items.summary_zh: PACT 可以让长期比特币持有者为最坏的量子场景做好准备，而无需转移资金或发出链上活动信号。

items.title: Brazil central bank prohibits crypto use in regulated cross-border payments under new FX rules
items.summary: The rule forms part of the central bank's broader effort to bring cross-border payments fully inside the regulated FX system.

items.title: A new narrative for bitcoin that will last

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: Six months out, control of the Senate is a dead heat, traders on Kalshi say
items.summary: While Democrats are favored to flip control of the House of Representatives, the upper chamber is a much closer race, traders believe.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员表示，六个月后，参议院的控制权势均力敌
items.summary_zh: 交易员认为，虽然民主党人倾向于扭转众议院的控制权，但上议院的竞争要激烈得多。

items.title: Berkshire shares struggle into annual meeting. Can Abel rekindle enthusiasm without Buffett center stage?
items.summary: For the first time, the 95-year-old Buffett won't be the central figure on stage, marking a new era for one of investing's most closely watched rituals.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔股票在年会上陷入困境。如果没有巴菲特的关注，阿贝尔能否重燃热情？
items.summary_zh: 95 岁的巴菲特将首次不再成为舞台上的中心人物，这标志着最受关注的投资仪式之一进入了新时代。

items.title: Here's why surging oil prices may not derail the consumer trade
items.summary: Wall Street is already looking beyond Big Tech quarterly results.
items.title_zh: 这就是为什么飙升的油价可能不会破坏消费贸易
items.summary_zh: 华尔街的目光已经超越了大型科技公司的季度业绩。

items.title: SoFi CEO defends decision to hold guidance steady
items.summary: SoFi CEO Anthony Noto explained that the company declined to raise its full-year outlook due to macro uncertainty, not weakness in fundamentals.
items.title_zh: SoFi 首席执行官为保持指导不变的决定进行辩护
items.summary_zh: SoFi 首席执行官 Anthony Noto 解释说，该公司拒绝上调全年展望是由于宏观不确定性，而不是基本面疲软。

items.title: French PM fuels row with trip to buy baguettes
items.summary: Sébastien Lecornu visited a boulangerie on Labour Day, defying unions who say 1 May must remain a mandatory rest day.
items.title_zh: 法国总理因购买法棍而引发争议
items.summary_zh: 塞巴斯蒂安·勒科尔努 (Sébastien Lecornu) 在劳动节那天参观了一家面包店，无视工会的要求，称 5 月 1 日必须仍然是强制休息日。

items.title: Turkish police arrest more than 500 people at May Day rallies
items.summary: Turkey sees significant police deployments on 1 May each year, when marches led by workers and unions are held.
items.title_zh: 土耳其警方在五一集会上逮捕了500多人
items.summary_zh: 土耳其每年 5 月 1 日都会部署大量警察，届时工人和工会会举行游行。

items.title: Israeli police arrest man after nun attacked in Jerusalem
items.summary: The French nun was pushed over and kicked in the apparently unprovoked assault, amid a rise in harassment of Christians in the city by Jewish extremists.
items.title_zh: 以色列警方在耶路撒冷修女遇袭后逮捕一名男子
items.summary_zh: 在该市犹太极端分子骚扰基督徒的事件增多之际，这名法国修女在这起看似无端的袭击中被推倒并被踢。

items.title: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla
items.summary: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".
items.title_zh: 以色列拦截加沙援助船队后释放希腊境内除两名活动人士外的所有活动人士
items.summary_zh: 全球苏姆德船队谴责这次拦截是“海盗行为”，而以色列外交部则称该船队是“公关噱头”。

items.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
items.summary: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.
items.title_zh: 缅甸前领导人昂山素季转为软禁，军方称
items.summary_zh: 这位诺贝尔和平奖获得者自 2021 年在军事政变中被赶下台以来一直被拘留。

items.title: Lithuania Says It Broke Up Russian Sabotage and Murder Plots
items.summary: The arrests of nine people are reminders of the threat Russia poses in Europe at a time when Washington has shifted focus to the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 立陶宛称其粉碎了俄罗斯的破坏和谋杀阴谋
items.summary_zh: 九人被捕提醒人们，在华盛顿将重点转向中东之际，俄罗斯对欧洲构成了威胁。

items.title: U.S. Indictment of Sinaloa’s Governor Is a Reckoning for Residents of the Mexican State
items.summary: The U.S. indictment of a Mexican governor confirms what many residents say they had long suspected: The line between organized crime and the upper echelons of government has blurred.
items.title_zh: 美国对锡那罗亚州州长的起诉是对墨西哥州居民的清算
items.summary_zh: 美国对墨西哥州长的起诉证实了许多居民长期以来的怀疑：有组织犯罪与政府高层之间的界限已经模糊。

items.title: What the End of Saudi Arabia’s Big-Spending Era Means for the Kingdom and Beyond
items.summary: The kingdom is pulling back from a costly and high-profile golf venture amid mounting financial concerns, raising questions about its plans.
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯大手笔时代的结束对沙特王国及其他国家意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 由于财务问题日益严重，沙特正在撤回一项耗资巨大、备受瞩目的高尔夫项目，这引发了人们对其计划的质疑。

items.title: Suspect in UK Stabbing Attack on Jewish Men Faces Third Attempted Murder Charge
items.summary: A man appeared in court charged with the attempted murder of two Jewish men in Golders Green, in north London, and of another man, an acquaintance, elsewhere in the city.
items.title_zh: 英国刺伤犹太男子的嫌疑人面临第三次谋杀未遂指控
items.summary_zh: 一名男子出庭，被控在伦敦北部戈尔德斯格林企图谋杀两名犹太男子，并在该市其他地方谋杀一名熟人。

items.title: How Indigenous Acknowledgments Became a Target in Australia
items.summary: Recognition of Aboriginal Australians has become standard at most public events. Increasingly, the right is taking aim at the practice.
items.title_zh: 原住民致谢如何成为澳大利亚的目标
items.summary_zh: 对澳大利亚原住民的认可已成为大多数公共活动的标准。右翼越来越多地瞄准这种做法。

items.title: In Bulgaria, a New Government Challenges an Old Puppet Master
items.summary: Delyan Peevski was a focus of protests that led to Bulgarian elections. Can a new government shake his hold on power?
items.title_zh: 在保加利亚，新政府挑战老傀儡师
items.summary_zh: 德利安·佩耶夫斯基 (Delyan Peevski) 是导致保加利亚选举的抗议活动的焦点。新政府能否撼动他的权力？

items.title: Tether posts $1.04 billion Q1 profit, reaches $8.23 billion reserve buffer
items.summary: The stablecoin issuer said the crypto market was highly volatile during the first quarter.
items.title_zh: Tether 第一季度利润 10.4 亿美元，储备缓冲达到 82.3 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该稳定币发行人表示，第一季度加密货币市场高度波动。

items.title: AI agent forms its own company, gets ready to trade crypto
items.summary: Although Manfred will not start trading crypto until the end of May, it already has a crypto wallet and credentials to hire staff, make payments and do business.
items.title_zh: AI代理成立自己的公司，准备交易加密货币
items.summary_zh: 尽管 Manfred 要到 5 月底才会开始交易加密货币，但它已经拥有一个加密钱包和雇佣员工、付款和开展业务的凭证。

items.title: European crypto asset manager CoinShares records $7.4 billion AUM in first annual filing since Nasdaq listing
items.summary: CoinShare saw revenue of $126.4 million on its asset management business in 2025, up 13% from the $111.7 million the year prior.
items.title_zh: 欧洲加密资产管理公司 CoinShares 在纳斯达克上市以来的首次年度报告中创下 74 亿美元的资产管理规模
items.summary_zh: CoinShare 2025 年资产管理业务收入为 1.264 亿美元，比上年的 1.117 亿美元增长 13%。

items.title: WisdomTree’s crypto ETPs reported net inflows of $137 million in Q1
items.summary: Cumulatively, assets under management for the firm's crypto ETPs rose to roughly $1.8 billion during Q1 of this year.
items.title_zh: WisdomTree 的加密货币 ETP 第一季度净流入 1.37 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 今年第一季度，该公司加密 ETP 管理的资产累计增至约 18 亿美元。

items.title: Crypto onramping solution Fun raises $72 million Series A co-led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire
items.summary: Fun powers deposits, withdrawals, and settlement flows for some of crypto’s leading apps, including Polymarket, Lighter, and Aave.
items.title_zh: 加密货币入门解决方案 Fun 筹集了由 Multicoin Capital 和 SignalFire 共同领投的 7200 万美元 A 轮融资
items.summary_zh: Fun 为一些加密货币领先应用程序（包括 Polymarket、Lighter 和 Aave）的存款、取款和结算流程提供支持。

items.title: Tether posts over $1 billion Q1 profit as reserve buffer reaches record $8.2 billion
items.summary: Tether's approximate $141 billion exposure to U.S. Treasurys positions it as one of the largest holders globally.
items.title_zh: Tether 第一季度利润超过 10 亿美元，储备金缓冲达到创纪录的 82 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Tether 持有约 1,410 亿美元的美国国债，使其成为全球最大的美国国债持有者之一。

items.title: South Korean court grants stay on Bithumb’s six-month suspension pending final ruling: reports
items.summary: South Korea's financial watchdog issued the suspension in March, alongside a 36.8 billion won ($25 million) fine.
items.title_zh: 韩国法院允许 Bithumb 暂停六个月，等待最终裁决：报道
items.summary_zh: 韩国金融监管机构于 3 月份发布了暂停令，并处以 368 亿韩元（2500 万美元）的罚款。

items.title: Riot reports $33 million in first data center revenue as AMD doubles contracted capacity
items.summary: Most of Riot Platforms' data center revenue came from lower-margin fit-out work, while recurring leases played a smaller role.
items.title_zh: 随着 AMD 合同容量翻倍，Riot 报告首个数据中心收入达 3300 万美元
items.summary_zh: Riot Platforms 数据中心的大部分收入来自利润率较低的装修工作，而经常性租赁的作用较小。

items.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
items.summary: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.
items.title_zh: 引入高级帐户安全
items.summary_zh: 引入高级帐户安全性：防网络钓鱼登录、更强的恢复以及增强的保护措施，以保护敏感数据并防止帐户被盗用。

items.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
items.title_zh: 构建智能时代的计算基础设施
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展 Stargate 以构建支持 AGI 的计算基础设施，增加新的数据中心容量以满足不断增长的 AI 需求。

items.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
items.title_zh: 智能时代的网络安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了一个由五部分组成的行动计划，旨在加强智能时代的网络安全，重点是实现人工智能驱动的网络防御的民主化和保护关键系统。

items.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.summary: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
items.title_zh: 编排的开源规范：Symphony
items.summary_zh: 了解 Symphony（Codex 编排的开源规范）如何将问题跟踪器转变为始终在线的代理系统，从而提高工程输出并减少上下文切换。

items.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.summary: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.
items.title_zh: Choco 通过 AI 代理实现食品配送自动化
items.summary_zh: Choco 如何使用 OpenAI API 简化食品配送、提高生产力并实现增长——关于真实世界人工智能影响的深入客户故事。

items.title_zh: 人工智能评估正在成为新的计算瓶颈

items.title_zh: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 简介：适用于文档、音频和视频代理的长上下文多模态智能

items.title_zh: 如何使用 OpenAI 的隐私过滤器构建可扩展的 Web 应用程序

items.summary: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌将通过 Kaggle 重新推出为期 5 天的人工智能代理强化课程，现已开放报名。

items.title: Elevating Austria: Google invests in its first data center in the Alps.
items.summary: Google has been a proud part of Austria’s landscape for years, and today, we’re announcing our first data center in Kronstorf, generating 100 direct jobs. This facility …

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
